text:
Created attachment 254573
www/py-ytmusicapi.patch

ytmusicapi is a Python library for interfacing with the YouTube Music API.
It enables users to search for music, manage playlists, and access artist
information using cookie-based authentication. It provides extensive
functionality for music exploration and library management.

WWW:    https://github.com/sigma67/ytmusicapi

Thanks.
